name: abTestAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || !output.result.variants || output.result.variants.every(function(v){ return Number.isFinite(v.conversionRate) && Number.isFinite(v.visitors) && Number.isFinite(v.conversions); })
output.ok === false || output.result.statisticallySignificant === undefined || typeof output.result.statisticallySignificant === 'boolean'
_note: LENS_ACTIONS calculator. reads artifact.data.variants (array of {name,visitors,conversions} pasted as JSON in MarketingActionPanel). <2 variants → {message} guidance only. conversionRate=conversions/visitors×100; winner=highest rate; lift=(winner-loser)/loser×100; statisticallySignificant when totalVisitors>1000 AND |lift|>5. POISON: visitors via finInt floored at 1, conversions via finInt → no NaN/Infinity in any rate (prior parseInt('Infinity')=NaN was masked by ||1 but not finite-guarded). Card renders winner/lift/variants[].name+conversionRate/totalVisitors/statisticallySignificant EXACTLY. Pinned by server/tests/marketing-lens-macros.test.js.
